noOneConnected: No one is connected to the room
blockedUserDescription: You can't message them unless you unblock them in chat details.
messageRequestsDescription: When someone who isn't in your contacts sends you a message, it will appear here.
messageRequestsTip: You can accept or decline requests. Accepted requests move to your primary inbox.
panicMode.title: Learn Coding Basics
panicMode.description: Welcome to your simple educational platform. Here you can find resources to learn HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript.
emptyState.selectConversation: Select a conversation from the list or start a new one
securityKeyRequired: Security Key Required • Messages are Encrypted
securityKeyDescription: Your messages are protected with end-to-end encryption. Please enter your password to restore your secure conversation.
e2eeModalDescription: Messages and calls in this chat are secured with end-to-end encryption. Verify {{name}}'s identity by comparing this security code.
reportAnonymousNotice: Your report is anonymous. If someone is in immediate danger, call local emergency services.
reportThankYou: Thank you for your report. We will review it shortly.
reportFailed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
blockConfirm: Are you sure you want to block {{name}}? They will no longer be able to message you and will be removed from your following/followers.
deleteConversationConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the entire conversation with {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
deleteChatFailed: Failed to delete chat. Please try again.
decryptionFailedDescription: This media could not be decrypted
sharedMediaDescription: Photos and audio shared in this chat will appear here
moderation.blockedContent: Sorry, your message contains severely blocked terms or your account has been rate-limited.
moderation.uploadFailed: Failed to upload media securely. Please check connection.
moderation.sendFailed: Message could not be sent because of policy restrictions or an account block.
reportReasons.nudity.title: Nudity or sexual activity
reportReasons.nudity.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Messages encouraging or showing sexual violence.
• Sexual solicitation or non-consensual sexual content.
reportReasons.hateSpeech.title: Hate speech or symbols
reportReasons.hateSpeech.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Hate speech that attacks people based on protected characteristics.
• Symbols or slogans associated with hate groups.
reportReasons.scam.title: Scam or fraud
reportReasons.scam.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Messages that try to trick people into sharing personal information.
• Fraudulent schemes or sharing malicious links.
reportReasons.violence.title: Violence or dangerous organizations
reportReasons.violence.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Content that encourages or promotes violence.
• Content related to terrorist or criminal organizations.
reportReasons.saleOfGoods.title: Sale of illegal or regulated goods
reportReasons.saleOfGoods.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Messages involving the sale of drugs or weapons.
• Counterfeit goods or other regulated products.
reportReasons.harassment.title: Bullying or harassment
reportReasons.harassment.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Targeted harassment or threats against specific people.
• Messages containing harmful or abusive language.
reportReasons.impersonation.title: Pretending to be someone else
reportReasons.impersonation.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Accounts that pretend to be someone else to deceive others.
• Misleading profiles using someone else's identity.
reportReasons.ipViolation.title: Intellectual property violation
reportReasons.ipViolation.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Content that uses someone else's copyrighted work without permission.
• Trademarks or patents used without authorization.
reportReasons.selfHarm.title: Suicide or self injury
reportReasons.selfHarm.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Messages encouraging or promoting self-injury, which includes suicide, cutting and eating disorders.
• Messages identifying victims of self-injury if the post attacks or makes fun of them.
reportReasons.spam.title: Spam
reportReasons.spam.guidelines:
We take action if we find:
• Repeated, unwanted, or suspicious messages.
• Messages created for the purpose of misleading users.
reportReasons.other.title: The problem isn't listed here
reportReasons.other.guidelines: We review reports even if the problem isn't listed here to ensure our community stays safe.
smartTour.steps.welcome.title: Welcome to JUST Social
smartTour.steps.welcome.description: Discover the next generation of secure and encrypted communication.
smartTour.steps.encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
smartTour.steps.encryption.description: All your messages are encrypted. Only you and your contact can read them.
smartTour.steps.voice.title: Smartly Verified Voice
smartTour.steps.voice.description: Your device automatically recognizes your unique human voice fingerprint.
smartTour.steps.geo.title: Full Geo-Lock Protection
smartTour.steps.geo.description: Calls are protected by a geographic wall to connect the right people securely.
smartTour.steps.gaze.title: Intelligent Gaze-Lock Shield
smartTour.steps.gaze.description: Conversations elegantly fade when you look away, protecting your privacy.
smartTour.steps.moderation.title: Smart AI Moderation
smartTour.steps.moderation.description: Advanced AI filters protect you from spam and harmful content proactively.
smartTour.steps.files.title: Secure File Sharing
smartTour.steps.files.description: Share files safely with encrypted attachments. Your documents stay private.
smartTour.steps.search.title: Message Search & History
smartTour.steps.search.description: Find any conversation instantly. Your chat history is always private.
smartTour.steps.offline.title: Offline Protection
smartTour.steps.offline.description: Conversations are protected even offline and sync when you reconnect.
